mapper.sql: select s.schedule_id, s.schedule_code, s.work_order_id, w.work_order_code, p.product_name, s.operation_id, o.operation_code, o.operation_name, s.resource_id, r.resource_code, r.resource_name, s.plan_start_time, s.plan_end_time, s.plan_qty, s.reported_qty, s.status, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.remark from mom_schedule s left join mom_work_order w on s.work_order_id = w.work_order_id left join ( select material_id product_id, material_code product_code, material_name product_name from mom_material where (material_type = 'product' or category_id in (select category_id from mom_material_category where category_code = 'FG' or category_name = '成品')) ) p on w.product_id = p.product_id left join mom_operation o on s.operation_id = o.operation_id left join mom_resource r on s.resource_id = r.resource_id
mapper.select: select count(1) from mom_schedule where schedule_code = #{scheduleCode} and schedule_id != #{scheduleId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_schedule(schedule_code, work_order_id, operation_id, resource_id, plan_start_time, plan_end_time, plan_qty, reported_qty, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{scheduleCode}, #{workOrderId}, #{operationId}, #{resourceId}, #{planStartTime}, #{planEndTime}, #{planQty}, #{reportedQty}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_schedule where schedule_id in #{scheduleId}
mapper.update: update mom_schedule set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
update mom_schedule set reported_qty = ifnull(reported_qty, 0) + #{qty}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
mapper.sql: select rep.report_id, rep.work_order_id, w.work_order_code, p.product_name, rep.schedule_id, rep.operation_id, o.operation_code, o.operation_name, rep.step_id, st.step_code, st.step_name, rep.resource_id, r.resource_name, rep.good_qty, rep.bad_qty, rep.report_time, rep.report_user, rep.status, rep.create_by, rep.create_time, rep.update_by, rep.update_time, rep.remark from mom_step_report rep left join mom_work_order w on rep.work_order_id = w.work_order_id left join ( select material_id product_id, material_code product_code, material_name product_name from mom_material where (material_type = 'product' or category_id in (select category_id from mom_material_category where category_code = 'FG' or category_name = '成品')) ) p on w.product_id = p.product_id left join mom_operation o on rep.operation_id = o.operation_id left join mom_work_step st on rep.step_id = st.step_id left join mom_resource r on rep.resource_id = r.resource_id
mapper.insert: insert into mom_step_report(work_order_id, schedule_id, operation_id, step_id, resource_id, good_qty, bad_qty, report_time, report_user, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{workOrderId}, #{scheduleId}, #{operationId}, #{stepId}, #{resourceId}, #{goodQty}, #{badQty}, #{reportTime}, #{reportUser}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_step_report where report_id in #{reportId}
mapper.update: update mom_work_order set completed_qty = ifnull(completed_qty, 0) + #{qty}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP where work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
mapper.select: select o.operation_id, o.routing_id, o.operation_code, o.operation_name, o.operation_seq from mom_work_order w join mom_operation o on w.routing_id = o.routing_id where w.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} and o.status = '0' order by o.operation_seq

select st.step_id, st.operation_id, o.operation_code, st.step_code, st.step_name, st.step_seq, st.step_desc, st.operation_type, st.screw_check_count, st.vision_program, st.guide_task_id, st.image_url from mom_work_order w join mom_operation o on w.routing_id = o.routing_id join mom_work_step st on o.operation_id = st.operation_id where w.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} and o.status = '0' and st.status = '0' order by o.operation_seq, st.step_seq
